title: Hyperliquid Perps on Mobile with Nest
summary_title: Building Mobile-First Trading on Hyperliquid with Nest Wallet
summary_description: Nest Wallet launches Hyperliquid perps on mobile with seamless UX, farming points, and roadmap for spot, staking, and HyperEVM integration.

key_moments.label: Introductions and setup for Nest Wallet discussion
Hosts discuss funding rates farming strategy on Hyperliquid
Nest Wallet team background from BitCo and DeFi wallet building
Soft launch of Hyperliquid perps on Nest Wallet announced
Feature requests including HYPE staking and spot trading for mobile
HyperEVM integration planned within two weeks pending demand
Future roadmap: one-click bridging, meme coin trackers, NFT support
Call to action: test app, give feedback, share feature ideas via DMs
